purpose: Defines a non-mutating import scan contract for externally generated weapon/class source and pixel sprite files.
rules: This contract scans incoming files and creates an import plan only; it must not copy, move, overwrite, or promote files.
Incoming files match planned outputs by exact file name, including gender, tone, motion, frame, and source/pixel suffix.
Unknown, duplicate, or non-PNG incoming files should block import planning until renamed or removed.
Matched files still need metadata QA, visual anchor review, and promotion readiness before runtime asset manifest registration.
